Package i5.cb.graph.diagram

Class DiagramNodeMouseListener

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.event.MouseAdapter
      • javax.swing.event.MouseInputAdapter
        • i5.cb.graph.diagram.DiagramNodeMouseListener

  • public class DiagramNodeMouseListener
extends javax.swing.event.MouseInputAdapter
    This is the standard MouseListener for every DiagramObject.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.awt.Point getStartDragPoint​()
      Getter for property startDragPoint.
      void mouseClicked​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
      This method is invoked when a mousebutton was pressed and released over a DiagramObject
      void mouseDragged​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
      Seems like this method is just used when a DiagramObject is moved, but not when it is resized
      void mousePressed​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
      This method is invoked if a mousebutton was pressed over a DiagramObject.
      void mouseReleased​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
      Does some postprocessing after having moved a nodes, i.e.
      void setStartDragPoint​(java.awt.Point startDragPoint)
      Setter for property startDragPoint.

      • mouseDragged

        public void mouseDragged​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
        Seems like this method is just used when a DiagramObject is moved, but not when it is resized

      • mouseReleased

        public void mouseReleased​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
        Does some postprocessing after having moved a nodes, i.e. setting smooth antialiased lines again, validate the locations of all edges, and repainting the whole
        Overrides:
        mouseReleased in class java.awt.event.MouseAdapter
